summary: FairXI v1.2 tested: P0 router split regression (48/48 pytest passing across all iter1-7 suites, zero test modifications), P1 privacy page + global footer + home footer link, P2 MOTS trophy reveal (happy path, threshold gating <5, dismissal + localStorage persistence). All passing.

minor.issue: Allows marking a match as played even when no players were added (bulk-add failed 422). Unrelated to this iter, but worth noting as pre-existing behavior.

critical_code_review_comments: deps.py + routers split is clean; server.py trimmed to ~114 lines as claimed. No endpoint path changed. Full pytest suite (48 tests) green with zero modifications required.
MOTSReveal.jsx: computeRevealThreshold correctly picks the largest unseen threshold <= playedCount. localStorage key `fairxi_mots_reveals_seen` shape verified.

Privacy.jsx accurately scoped — mentions phone numbers, self-declared/dynamic ratings, MVP votes, payment toggle, and explicit 'do not sell/share'. No references to third-party analytics/trackers not actually used.
AppFooter correctly suppressed on Home ('/'), rendered elsewhere with data-testid='app-footer' + 'footer-privacy-link'.
GroupDashboard uses statuses ('played','completed','mvp_voting_open') for played count; consistent with mark-played backend behavior.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in the app.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test groups: TEST_MOTS_Reveal2 (6 played matches, triggers threshold 5) and TEST_MOTS_Small (3 played, no trigger). Persisted in MongoDB; safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest is fully green under new router structure. Frontend testids used: privacy-label, home-footer-privacy, app-footer, footer-privacy-link, mots-reveal, mots-name, mots-tbd, mots-close, mots-share, mots-download. Note: for MOTS reveal test, clear localStorage key 'fairxi_mots_reveals_seen' before load. Group match creation requires total_cost + max_players fields in payload.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues found in scope.
